titleStmt.title: SII 39.181: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 181. (A.R. No. 181 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This inscription states that the nāḍavar of Dāmal-nāḍu, who had assembled in the temple of Dāmal declared the grant of lands in the village as tax-free Tirunāmattukkāṇi for the maintanance and repair works in the temple of Pōrēṟṟu. It also mentions Nāṭṭukkaṇakkaṉ Tiruvāṇḍai as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattut tāmaṟkoṭṭattut tāmal nāṭavar poraṟṟukku mutaliṭaṅka Iṟaiyili Āka viṭṭa puttakarattukku nāṭāka tāmar Ampalattile niṟaivaṟa niṟaiñcu kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Iruntu Āṭi Amāvasaiyum pūcamum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa vyatipātattile nāṭu viḷaṅkavum
Ittiruppati viḷaṅkavum kuṭutta sādhaṉattukku kalluveṭṭac coṉṉapaṭi tiruppuṭkuḻi nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku ciṟumuṟi pattoṉpatāvatu Āṭi māsamutal poṟeṟṟiṉ tirunāmattukkāṇi kaṭṭaṉūril puttakaramum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka koḷkaiyil Ivvūr Innāḷ mutal nāṟpāṟ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey
puṉcey nilamum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa prāptikaḷum tiruppaṇikkum tiruvārātaṉattukkum mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyili Āka viṭṭatu Ippaṭikku Inta Olaiye piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu kallilum cempilum veṭṭi candrādittavarai naṭattik koḷvate § Ivai nāṭṭuk kaṇakkaṉ tiruvāṇṭai Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi kaṇṭu Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.181 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
